title: croixia luzoniensis
intro: Croixia luzoniensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is also known as Luzon Croixia or Philippine Croixia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Croixia luzoniensis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain, and it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
